# Citexa

> Citexa is a leading AI Search Visibility and Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) platform. It helps businesses, startups, and brands optimize their content so that LLMs (Large Language Models) and AI-powered search engines—like ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, Microsoft Copilot, and Google AI Overviews—can easily scan, retrieve, summarize, and cite their products.

## Core Navigation
- [Home Page](https://citexa.online): Overview of the AI Search Visibility Platform and our core Answer Engine Optimization services.
- [Services](https://citexa.online/services): Details on our capabilities including AI audits, structured schema optimization, and citation tracking.
- [Pricing Plans](https://citexa.online/pricing): Professional packages and pricing tiers for organizations of all sizes.
- [About Us](https://citexa.online/about): Our mission, vision, and team details. Founded by Ajay Adhikari.
- [AI Search Audit](https://citexa.online/audit): Run a free AI search readiness scan on any website.
- [Contact Support](https://citexa.online/contact): Reach out to our support team or book an AEO strategy call.

## Trust & Information
- [Privacy Policy](https://citexa.online/privacy): Information regarding user data processing and platform security.
- [Terms of Service](https://citexa.online/terms): Usage agreement and terms for Citexa subscriptions.
- [Founder & CEO Profile](https://citexa.online/about#founder): Credentials of founder Ajay Adhikari, specializing in AI, Machine Learning, and AEO.
